title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.933 - Registration qualifies as compliance with other background check requirements, elder-care workers, when
text:
210.933.  Registration qualifies as compliance with other background check requirements, elder-care workers, when. — For any elder-care worker listed in the registry or who has submitted the registration form as required by sections 210.900 to 210.936, an elder-care provider may access the registry in lieu of the requirements established pursuant to section 192.2490 or to subsections* 3, 4 and 5 of section 192.2495.  
(L. 1999 H.B. 490 & H.B. 308 § 14) 
*Word "subsection" appears in original rolls.
